headline: Student Housing Crisis Hits 8 Public Universities in 2026
context: At least 8 public universities cannot house all eligible students due to insufficient hostel capacity for 2026 intake.

cards.big: 22,000 first-year students denied on-campus housing at 8 public universities
cards.sub: Students forced to find private rentals costing RM500-800 monthly

cards.big: UiTM Shah Alam has 45,000 students but hostel capacity for only 28,000
cards.sub: Shortfall has persisted for over a decade without adequate investment

cards.big: B40 students spend up to 35% of household income on off-campus housing
cards.sub: Financial burden contributes to dropout rates among lower-income students

cards.big: PPP hostel projects at 3 universities reported 2-year construction delays
cards.sub: Contractor performance issues and cost overruns plagued procurement

cards.big: Affordable student housing is not a perk—it determines who can afford to graduate
Should public universities guarantee housing for all B40 students regardless of capacity
